_meta.label: SYNTHETIC — hand-authored Chinese ASR confusion table for deterministic noise simulation
_meta.purpose: Structurally-motivated near-homophone / tone / medical-term / segmentation confusions used to corrupt zh transcripts toward a target CER. Each entry is a plausible ASR misrecognition grounded in published error mechanisms (pinyin homophone, tone confusion, OOV medical-entity fallback). These are illustrative, not an empirical lexicon.

homophone._doc: Same/near pinyin, different character — substitution preserves syllable count (1 char -> 1 char).

tone._doc: Same initial+final, wrong tone class — far-field reverberation smears pitch contour.

medical_term._doc: Multi-char medical entity -> phonetically-proximate but clinically-wrong string (OOV fallback).

function_words._doc: Acoustically-weak monosyllabic 虚词 that ASR beam search prunes (deletion). 不/没 deletion flips clinical polarity.

number_unit._doc: ITN errors: duration/quantity morphemes conflated with time/other units.

segmentation._doc: Boundary-shift candidates: a 2-char compound that ASR may split or merge wrongly, emitted as a wrong compound. 1->1 char per position keeps length stable.
